Asset.title: Asset
Asset.description: Represents a physical asset such as equipment, structure, or component that needs inspection.

description.description: A detailed description of the asset.

location.description: The physical location of the asset.

qrCode.description: The QR code associated with the asset for easy identification.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL for the asset's thumbnail image.

Inspection.title: Inspection
Inspection.description: Represents an inspection event performed on an asset.

jobId.description: Reference to the Job this inspection is part of.

assetId.description: Reference to the Asset being inspected.

scheduleDate.description: The date the inspection is scheduled.

completionDate.description: The date the inspection was completed.

Report.title: Report
Report.description: Represents the report generated after an inspection.

inspectionId.description: Reference to the Inspection this report is for.

reportData.description: The actual report data, likely stored as a JSON string.

auditorId.description: Reference to the User (Auditor) who approved the report.

Job.title: Job
Job.description: Represents a job request created by a client for NDT inspection services.

clientId.description: Reference to the User (Client) who created the job.

providerId.description: Reference to the User (Provider) awarded the job.

auditorId.description: Reference to the User (Auditor) assigned for review, if applicable.

assetIds.description: An array of Asset IDs this job pertains to. This is mandatory for client-created jobs.

technicianIds.description: An array of User IDs (Inspectors) assigned to the job.

equipmentIds.description: An array of Equipment IDs assigned to the job.

location.description: The location where the job needs to be performed.

technique.description: The NDT technique required for the job.

status.description: Current status of the job (e.g., Posted, Assigned, Completed).

Bid.title: Bid
Bid.description: Represents a bid submitted by an inspector for a job.

inspectorId.description: Reference to the User (Inspector) who submitted the bid.

price.description: The price quoted in the bid.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the application.

email.description: The email address of the user.

companyId.description: The ID of the company this user belongs to.

Equipment.title: Equipment
Equipment.description: Represents a piece of NDT equipment used by an inspector or service provider.

type.description: The category of equipment (e.g., Instrument, Probe).

providerId.description: ID of the provider company that owns this equipment.

status.description: Current status (e.g., Available, In Use, Calibration Due).

thumbnailUrl.description: URL for the equipment's thumbnail image.

Company.title: Company
Company.description: Represents a company entity, which can be a Client, Provider, or Auditor.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: A chat thread, usually associated with a job.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A single message within a chat thread.

SupportChat.title: SupportChat
SupportChat.description: A support chat thread between a user and the platform support team.

userId.description: ID of the user who initiated the chat.

SupportMessage.title: SupportMessage
SupportMessage.description: A single message within a support chat thread.

UserAuditLog.title: User Audit Log
UserAuditLog.description: Logs user management actions like invitations, status changes, and role promotions.

actorName.description: Name of the user who performed the action.

actorCompany.description: Company of the user who performed the action.

targetUserName.description: Name of the user who was the target of the action.

details.description: Optional additional details about the action.

JobAuditLog.title: Job Audit Log
JobAuditLog.description: Logs significant events in a job's lifecycle, such as creation, bidding, and status changes.

jobId.description: ID of the job this log pertains to.

actorName.description: Name of the user who performed the action.

BillingAuditLog.title: Billing Audit Log
BillingAuditLog.description: Logs billing-related events like subscription changes and payment statuses.

companyName.description: The company associated with the billing event.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Represents a review submitted by a client for a service provider after a job is completed.

jobId.description: Reference to the Job this review is for.

providerId.description: Reference to the User (Provider) being reviewed.

clientId.description: Reference to the User (Client) who wrote the review.

rating.description: The star rating given, from 1 to 5.

comment.description: The text content of the review.

date.description: The date the review was submitted.

status.description: The moderation status of the review.

definition.description: Stores all jobs from all clients.
Stores all bids for all jobs.
Stores all inspections for all jobs.
Stores all reports for all inspections.
Stores all equipment for all providers.
Stores all company profiles (clients, providers, auditors).
Stores subscription details for all companies.
Stores support chat threads between users and the platform admin.
Stores all reviews submitted by clients for providers.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed with a flattened data model. Each major entity (users, assets, jobs, companies, etc.) is a top-level collection. This approach simplifies querying (e.g., fetching all open jobs) and makes security rules more direct and manageable. Relationships between documents are maintained using stored IDs (e.g., a 'job' document contains a 'clientId'). This avoids deep nesting, which can complicate security and data retrieval, adhering to Firestore best practices for scalable and secure applications. Chat messages and Support Messages are stored in a subcollection under a chat document to allow for efficient loading of message history for a specific chat.
